testcase.name: runScenario["Dismiss login popup on the homepage", "Flipkart Homepage Login Popup"](1)

failure.message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"(//div[@class='q7ywiQ'])[1]"} (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception Build info: version: '4.40.0', revision: 'b3333f1' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [a99d981835b162c4b3de4679ff31a1b3, findElement {value=(//div[@class='q7ywiQ'])[1], using=xpath}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.165, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\tejas\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:57965}, goog:processID: 32484, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:57965/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.165, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: a99d981835b162c4b3de4679ff31a1b3

testcase.system-out: Scenario: Dismiss login popup on the homepage # classpath:features/Popup_Dismiss.feature:3 ✔ Given I access the Flipkart homepage as a non-logged-in user # stepdefinitions.Popup_Dismiss.i_access_the_flipkart_homepage_as_a_non_logged_in_user() ✘ And a login popup is displayed # stepdefinitions.Popup_Dismiss.a_login_popup_is_displayed()
